meaning: n.雷管,装填物,起爆药,底漆
examples: Ireland is taking its lumps now and priming the Banks to get back into the business of lending.
Obviously something is priming the risk, and it looks like that may be a genetic predisposition.
Because having a kid appears to cut testosterone levels-essentially priming men to be better dads.
The pump priming of US financial markets will die an honorourable death come June 30, 2011.
Moreover, even if all the spending is new--extremely unlikely--pump priming loses its effectiveness over time.
